Date: Tue Jan 22 02:23:58 2013
New Revision: 310795
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310795

Log:
  - Update to 1.4
  - Update maintainer email address
  
  PR:		ports/174772
  Submitted by:	Robert Gogolok <gogo@cs.uni-sb.de> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/textproc/rubygem-rak/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/textproc/rubygem-rak/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/textproc/rubygem-rak/Makefile

+++ head/textproc/rubygem-rak/Makefile	Tue Jan 22 02:23:58 2013	(r310795)
@@ -5,11 +5,11 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	rak
-PORTVERSION=	1.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.4
 CATEGORIES=	textproc rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
-MAINTAINER=	gogo@cs.uni-sb.de
+MAINTAINER=	gogolok+freebsd@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	A grep replacement in pure Ruby
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-hoe>=1.3.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-hoe
